name: Cranberry-Rice Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown rice in water until tender, about 1 hour.
2. In a skillet, sauté the dried thyme and dried basil with vegetable oil until fragrant.
3. Add the mushrooms and cook until they are tender.
4. Stir in the chopped onions and continue cooking until the onions are soft.
5. Mix in the cranberries and combine all ingredients thoroughly.
6. Use this mixture as a stuffing for one small chicken.
Note: This recipe is shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93. The nutritional information provided is based on using 1/4 recipe - 88 calories, 1/2 bread, 1/2 fruit, 1 fat exchange, 11 grams carbohydrate, 2 grams protein, 4 grams fat, 82 mg sodium, and 172 mg potassium with no cholesterol.
